# Week 10

## Materials

📕 [Class slides]({{< var spring-week10-class-slides >}})

📗 [MEDS Computational Server Offboarding]({{< var computational-server-offboarding >}})

💭 [In-class team reflections]({{< var team-reflections-411B >}})

## Surveys

**PLEASE FILL THIS ONE OUT AND LET ME KNOW WHAT WORKED WELL FOR YOU AND WHAT COULD BE IMPROVED**

🗂 [UCSB Course Evaluation](https://ucsb.bluera.com/ucsb) 

🗂 [Capstone Advisor Evaluation](https://ucsb.co1.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_eFkt8W8NC512s2W)

## Schedule

12:30 - 12:45 : Final Presentations Check-in

12:45 - 1:00 : Remaining deadlines

1:00 - 1:30 : GitHub releases

1:30 - 1:45 : Secure Copy Protocol (SCP) demo -  Kat Le, Bren School

1:45 - 2:45 : Group work

2:45 3:00 : 

2:00 - 2:50 : Capstone Wrap-up: individual and team reflection

2:50 - 4:00 : Pizza and surveys! 🍕😋


## Upcoming deadlines

![](/411b_spring/images/411b_2025_deadlines7.png)

## To do by Friday, June 6

### 2. 🌱 Complete Personal Reflection 2
**When? Due on Wednesday, June 4 at 5 PM.**

**How? Share document or send via email to instructor (detailed instructions in the template).**
Please complete and share your Personal Reflection 2 with the instructor:

[[TEMPLATE] Personal Reflection 2 – 411B](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kZvkDdX1syY6bKxbNKnaDtkfHZ2JY_zD7HelEkvwfyo/edit?usp=share_link)

Detailed instructions are included in the template.

This is an individual assignment. Each person is responsible for submitting their own reflection and making sure the instructor is notified once it’s shared.

If you would like to set up a meeting with me (Carmen) to chat about anything, please message me and we can find a time that works.

### 🗂 Complete Faculty Advisor Evaluation and Course Surveys

**When? Due on Friday, June 6 at 5 PM.**

**How? Just complete the surveys through the links.**

Thank you completing these! Your feedback really helps to improve the capstone courses!

1. [UCSB Course Evaluation](https://ucsb.bluera.com/ucsb)

2. [Internal Course Survey](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc5ytdKeI0vduJyZMYPBHBsxSi1-ct6su6KyQ22U0jf9688hA/viewform?usp=pp_url)

3. [Capstone Advisor Evaluation](https://ucsb.co1.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_eFkt8W8NC512s2W)

The Capstone Advisor Evaluation is part of your MEDS academic final deliverables.

### 📥 Submit final Technical Documentation and GitHub repository

**When? Due on Friday, June 6 at 5 PM.**

**How? [Upload files to Box](https://ucsb.app.box.com/f/3825d6797ae94eb3bf50e94bb0bbe1cb).**

- Your faculty advisor must have approved it and signed before submitting it.
- Collect signature from your advisor (first), then me. DocuSign might be the easiest way to do this.
- You will need to upload two *separate* files for your TD:
    1. The final version of your TD with a blank signature page in PDF format with your Capstone Project short name 
    2. The signature page in PDF format.

### 📥  Submit Peer/Self Evaluation
**When? Due on Friday, June 6 at 5 PM.**

**How? [Upload file to Box](https://ucsb.app.box.com/f/894684b7664a4a018f3caee42d067139).**

- Each student must complete a [Capstone Project Peer & Self Evaluation Form](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1TVoy2lkgngVSVfaeYptlxgegg_y-Sb2B/edit?usp=share_link&ouid=111507336322611936333&rtpof=true&sd=true) for Winter Quarter. You can also find the form in the [Bren resources website](https://bren.ucsb.edu/academic-resources-current-students).
- Upload your evaluation form to Box and save your document with your Capstone Project short name and your full name as the file name (e.g., SaferSeafood Emily Case).
- You must also email your peer evaluation directly to your faculty advisor. 

## Congratulations on Finishing Your Capstone Projects!

![](/411b_spring/images/commencement.png)


Hi Jamie, hope you had a nice weekend! I'm finishing the prep for today's capstone class. Could please share with me the following links:

URL to Capstone advisor evaluation for students
Link to the MEDS EOY survey.

Also, here's what I have planned for the class today:
